title: Breaking Bad Paintings
description: Adds new Minecraft paintings featuring characters and scenes from Breaking Bad Paintings
body:
This mod adds a collection of new Minecraft paintings featuring characters and scenes from Breaking Bad.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20d79664172581444295adf770b28ed95f28284e.jpeg)

- You can place the paintings in the same way as vanilla paintings.
- This mod does not replace any existing paintings and is compatible with other painting mods.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!

fan creation: not officially associated with the original creators
